creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

Change category and title. The bug is in GCC 4.2 that avoid screensaver 
to build with -O. The patch to fix GCC can be found at its SVN. 

http://gcc.gnu.org/viewcvs?view=revision&revision=130440 

The GNATS is: http://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=34215
